column2: 1. Which country are you currently studying or freelancing in?
column3: 2. What is your primary area of tech focus?
column4: 3. What is your current academic/professional status?
column5: 4. What is the biggest barrier you face when applying for remote or regional tech opportunities? (Select all that apply)
column6: 5. How do you currently showcase your technical or creative projects to prospective clients/employers?
column7: 6. On a scale of 1 to 5, how confident do you feel that your current resume accurately represents what you can actually build?
column8: 7. If an AI could scan your messy project notes, class assignments, or GitHub links and instantly structure them into a polished, executive-ready portfolio case study, how valuable would that be to you?
column9: 8. How often does the cost of mobile data or poor internet connectivity disrupt your ability to search for work or update your online profiles?
column10: 9. Would you use a lightweight WhatsApp assistant to update your portfolio status or receive direct job matches without loading a heavy website?
